scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter worker exec wrangler deploy
scripts.cf:d1:create: pnpm --filter worker exec wrangler d1 create lexigo-scores
scripts.cf:r2:create: pnpm --filter worker exec wrangler r2 bucket create lexigo-dictionary
scripts.cf:dictionary:upload: pnpm --filter worker exec wrangler r2 object put lexigo-dictionary/dict.txt --file ../server/data/dict.txt --remote
scripts.cf:db:migrate:remote: pnpm --filter worker exec wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
